scripts.build:popup: cd popup && npm install && npm run build
scripts.copy:core: cp -r _locales icons manifest.json background.js export.js history.js metadata.js content_script.js build/
scripts.copy:libs: cp node_modules/jszip/dist/jszip.min.js build/jszip.js &&  mkdir -p build/popup/src &&  cp node_modules/@alpinejs/csp/dist/cdn.min.js build/popup/src/alpine.js
scripts.copy:popup: mkdir -p build/popup && cp popup/src/popup.js build/popup/src/popup.js &&  cp -r popup/dist/* build/popup/
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:popup && npm run copy:core && npm run copy:libs && npm run copy:popup
